title: (Bullish Signal) MIME, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling MIME's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 44 similar cases where MIME's MACD histogram became positive, and 37 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 84%. Current price $46.24 is above $42.30 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 04/09/21 - 05/11/21, the price experienced a +14% Uptrend. During the week of 05/04/21 - 05/11/21, the stock enjoyed a +10% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/t8dhlo1xqpy61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=d9abd923f7c8e938ce883fdb9d783c6d4eab6b83

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 40 of 49 cases where MIME's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on May 11, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on MIME as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 79 of 107 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for MIME just turned positive on May 11, 2021. Looking at past instances where MIME's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 37 of 44 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

MIME moved above its 50-day Moving Average on May 05, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +7.96% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MIME advanced for three days, in 288 of 365 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 231 of 323 cases where MIME Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 72%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11109468-mimecast-mime-46-12-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
